body:
## Documentation Gap **Package:** `Azure.Provisioning.ContainerInstance` **Service directory:** `sdk/containerinstance/Azure.Provisioning.ContainerInstance/` **Triggered by:** commit 1f3da719ae556f01d84f400205e15fb56924c1c1 (PR #57490) by @ArcturusZhang ## What Changed PR #57490 added the initial `1.0.0-beta.1` release of the `Azure.Provisioning.ContainerInstance` library. It includes four generated provisioning resource types: - `ContainerGroup` — basic container group (has an example in README) - `ContainerGroupProfile` — reusable container group profile - `ContainerGroupProfileRevision` — versioned revision of a container group profile - `NGroup` — N-Group resource for confidential/scale container scenarios ## Gaps Found - No README example for `ContainerGroupProfile` — this resource type enables reusable container templates and is a first-class provisioning resource with no documentation - No README example for `ContainerGroupProfileRevision` — revision management of container group profiles is undocumented - No README example for `NGroup` — an entirely new resource concept ("N-Group") with no explanation or sample usage; the name alone offers no guidance to users - Only one test snippet exists (`Snippet:ContainerInstanceBasic`) covering just `ContainerGroup`; no test-backed samples are provided for the three remaining resource types - The "Authenticate the Client" section in README is empty (a heading with no content) - The "Next steps" section in README is empty
📐 Implementation Guide This section contains step-by-step instructions for a coding agent to implement the changes described above. ### Step 1: Understand the existing structure The test backing the current snippet is at: `sdk/containerinstance/Azure.Provisioning.ContainerInstance/tests/BasicContainerInstanceTests.cs` It uses the `Trycep` provisioning test helper with `#region Snippet:ContainerInstanceBasic` / `#endregion` to supply the snippet shown in the README. Follow the same pattern for the new snippets. ### Step 2: Add or update code snippets #### 2a. Add a `ContainerGroupProfile` + `ContainerGroupProfileRevision` example Add a new test method to `sdk/containerinstance/Azure.Provisioning.ContainerInstance/tests/BasicContainerInstanceTests.cs` (or a new `BasicContainerInstanceProfileTests.cs` in the same folder): ```csharp internal static Trycep CreateContainerGroupProfileTest() { return new Trycep().Define( ctx => { #region Snippet:ContainerInstanceProfile Infrastructure infra = new(); ContainerGroupProfile profile = new(nameof(profile), ContainerGroupProfile.ResourceVersions.V2025_09_01) { ContainerGroupOSType = ContainerInstanceOperatingSystemType.Linux, RestartPolicy = ContainerGroupRestartPolicy.Always, Containers = { new ContainerInstanceContainer { Name = "hello", Image = "mcr.microsoft.com/azuredocs/aci-helloworld", Resources = new ContainerResourceRequirements { Requests = new ContainerResourceRequestsContent { Cpu = 1, MemoryInGB = 1.5 } } } } }; infra.Add(profile); #endregion return infra; }); } [Test] public async Task CreateContainerGroupProfile() { await using Trycep test = CreateContainerGroupProfileTest(); // add expected bicep comparison string here after verifying output test.Compare("""..."""); } ``` > **Note:** Inspect the generated `ContainerGroupProfile.cs` and `ContainerGroupProfileRevision.cs` under `src/Generated/` to determine the correct properties and `ResourceVersions` constants to use, and fill in the expected Bicep output in `test.Compare(...)`. #### 2b. Add an `NGroup` example Add a method showing how to create an `NGroup` resource. Inspect `src/Generated/NGroup.cs` for required properties. Wrap the infrastructure-definition code with: ``` #region Snippet:ContainerInstanceNGroup ... #endregion ``` #### 2c. Add snippet placeholders in the README In `sdk/containerinstance/Azure.Provisioning.ContainerInstance/README.md`, under the `## Examples` section, add two new subsections **after** the existing "Create a Linux Container Group with a Public IP" subsection: ```markdown ### Create a Container Group Profile TODO: brief description ```C# Snippet:ContainerInstanceProfile ``` ### Create an NGroup TODO: brief description ```C# Snippet:ContainerInstanceNGroup ``` ``` #### 2d. Fill the empty "Authenticate the Client" section For provisioning libraries, authentication is handled by `azd` at deploy time, not by the library at runtime. Add the following content under the `### Authenticate the Client` heading: ```markdown This library generates Bicep infrastructure definitions and does not connect to Azure at authoring time. Authentication is handled by the [Azure Developer CLI (`azd`)](https://learn.microsoft.com/azure/developer/azure-developer-cli/overview) when you run `azd up` or `azd provision` to deploy the generated infrastructure to Azure. ``` #### 2e. Fill the "Next steps" section ```markdown - Explore the [Azure Container Instances documentation](https://learn.microsoft.com/azure/container-instances/) - Learn about [Azure Developer CLI (`azd`)](https://learn.microsoft.com/azure/developer/azure-developer-cli/overview) for deploying provisioning infrastructure - Browse the [Azure.Provisioning](https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-net/tree/main/sdk/provisioning/Azure.Provisioning) core library for shared infrastructure primitives ``` ### Step 3: Verify README structure The README at `sdk/containerinstance/Azure.Provisioning.ContainerInstance/README.md` currently contains all required sections, but the following are empty or incomplete: | Section | Status | Action | |---|---|---| | Getting started > Install the package | ✅ | None | | Getting started > Prerequisites | ✅ | None | | Getting started > Authenticate the Client | ❌ Empty | Add content per Step 2d | | Key concepts | ✅ Minimal (consistent with other provisioning libs) | None | | Examples | ⚠️ Only ContainerGroup | Add snippets per Step 2a–2c | | Troubleshooting | ✅ | None | | Next steps | ❌ Empty | Add content per Step 2e | | Contributing | ✅ | None | Use `sdk/keyvault/Azure.Security.KeyVault.Secrets/README.md` as the canonical reference for section formatting. ### Step 4: Validate Run these commands in order. Each must succeed before proceeding to the next. 1. `dotnet build sdk/containerinstance/Azure.Provisioning.ContainerInstance/` 2. `dotnet test sdk/containerinstance/Azure.Provisioning.ContainerInstance/ --filter TestCategory!=Live` 3. `eng/scripts/Update-Snippets.ps1 containerinstance` — injects `#region Snippet:` code into README placeholder blocks; verify the README diff looks correct 4. `eng/scripts/Export-API.ps1 containerinstance` — no public API changes expected, but run to confirm 5. `dotnet format sdk/containerinstance/Azure.Provisioning.ContainerInstance/`
## Next Steps > [!TIP] > **Ready for automated implementation?** Assign this issue to **@copilot** to have Copilot coding agent implement the changes described in the Implementation Guide above
title: [ContainerInstance] Docs: Add examples for ContainerGroupProfile, ContainerGroupProfileRevision, and NGroup resource types
